posts.author: cameron.falconer (Cameron Falconer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m a new user to Monday.com within my Enterprise organisation. Loving it so far!

Just checking in to see if anyone has any idea on how I can get my board to AUTO sort by the due date when a date is updated?

User case:
I have 10x rows, all of which are due for 1st Jan.
I change the first row, to the due date of 2nd of Jan.

Can my board AUTOMATICALLY move this row to the bottom of my board, without manually re-sorting the column? I’ve searched around and cannot find the answer to this. I’ve also been through many, many automation to no avail.

Thanks!
Cameron

posts.author: boyan.tzvetkov (Boyan Tzvetkov)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also love to know how this is possible!

posts.author: Clarke.Roberts (Clarke Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great feature, especially if I add a new task to a group. At the moment, I have to re-sort the column.
